name: Thanos
description: Thanos of Titan, the Mad Titan, is an Eternal born with the Deviant Syndrome who became obsessed with the concept of universal balance. Believing that overpopulation would doom all civilizations, he embarked on a galaxy-spanning crusade to collect the six Infinity Stones and assembled them in a golden gauntlet to erase half of all life with a single snap. Possessing superhuman strength, durability, intelligence, and an indomitable will, Thanos is the most formidable villain the Avengers have ever faced.
